description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSVC build that runs on push to master branch, tags matching v*.*.*, and specific paths, as well as on pull requests to master branch affecting specific paths. The workflow should have two jobs, x64 and x86, both running on windows-latest. For each job, check out the code, set up the MSVC development environment, cache and set up libraries, configure CMake with Debug build type, and then build the project.
